title: JPrunier Launches AI-Powered Room Booking Integration
excerpt: We're excited to announce our new intelligent room booking system that seamlessly integrates with Crestron control systems.
author: Innovation Team
content: Our latest solution combines AI scheduling with real-time room availability, allowing organizations to optimize their meeting spaces and improve user experience.

title: JPrunier Earns Crestron Specialist Certification
excerpt: We're proud to announce our renewed certification as a premier Crestron integration partner.
author: Leadership
content: This certification demonstrates our commitment to excellence and our team's expertise in designing and implementing Crestron-based solutions.

title: Expanding to New Markets: JPrunier Opens Paris Office
excerpt: We're thrilled to open our new European hub to better serve our clients across France and beyond.
author: CEO
content: Our Paris office will provide localized support, consulting services, and integration capabilities across Europe.

title: Webinar: The Future of Intelligent AV Systems
excerpt: Join our experts as we discuss trends in AI-powered automation and the evolution of modern control systems.
author: Education Team
content: Register now for our complimentary webinar exploring how AI is transforming the AV integration industry.
